summary: A Go-based CLI tool for detecting, migrating, validating, and running Goss configurations in monorepo and Kubernetes environments.
concerns: Uncommitted changes (1 modified, 1 staged) may indicate incomplete work
Heavy reliance on test files for understanding core logic suggests documentation gaps
ClaudeDesktop/specs directory indicates tight coupling to a specific AI tooling workflow
suggestions: Commit or stash the pending changes to maintain a clean working tree
Add inline documentation or README files to reduce dependency on test files for understanding
Decouple from Claude-specific tooling if broader adoption is a goal
